subject: Public Health
title: The Plague of Athens
description: Learn The Plague of Athens in one minute.

hook.text: In 430 BCE, a mysterious disease tore through Athens during its war with Sparta.

buildup.text: Thucydides described the horror—fever, blisters, and despair as one-third of the city died.

discovery.text: Overcrowded wartime conditions behind city walls accelerated the spread dramatically.

twist.text: Historians still debate the cause—typhoid, smallpox, or Ebola have all been proposed.

climax.text: Athens never fully recovered. The plague shifted the balance of power in the ancient Greek world.

punchline.text: A disease ended Athens' golden age.

quiz.question: Who recorded the details of the Plague of Athens?
